mcq.question: What is sequence in programming?
mcq.correct: Instructions are executed one after another in order
wrong: Instructions run at the same time
Instructions only run if a condition is true

mcq.question: Why is the order of instructions important?
mcq.correct: Changing the order can change the result
wrong: The order does not affect the result

mcq.question: What happens first in an input-process-output sequence?
What does this do: x ← 5?
mcq.correct: Stores the value 5 in variable x

mcq.question: What is the output of: x ← 5 then OUTPUT x?
What happens if you change the order of instructions in a sequence?
wrong: The CPU will ignore the change
